category_sources: source_facts.description says pgcopydb copies a Postgres database to a target Postgres server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as pgcopydb.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and docs directory are the upstream documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies copying Postgres databases; source_facts.executables lists pgcopydb.
